name: Feature Request

---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Describe the use case that would benefit from this feature.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
